item.block1: Factories, military bases, ships and sewage-treatment plants
item.block2: contribute to toxic wastes in Puget Sound, Washington.

item.block1: The Puget Sound Water Quality Authority has been overseeing efforts to
item.block2: clean up contaminated sediments and control the sources of pollution.

item.block1: State sediment-management standards and federal law
item.block2: regulate methods for dredging, disposing, and cleanup of contaminated sediments.

item.block1: TBT, or tributyl tin, is added to boat paints to
item.block2: kill or repel barnacles that foul ships' hulls.

item.block1: TBT, which seeps out of the paint into the water,
It is proven that the banning of TBT
item.block2: encourages marine populations to return to the area.
did not reproduce and had malformed shells.

item.block1: After regulations reduced the use of TBT, oyster production
item.block2: increased and shell deformation decreased dramatically.
